description_long: This is a modern, belt-fed machine gun with a robust, matte black metal body and a fixed synthetic stock. The rifle features a prominent handguard, a bipod attachment, and a visible ammunition belt feeding from a box magazine mounted on the left side. The receiver and barrel assembly are detailed with mechanical components, including a charging handle and iron sights. The grip is ergonomic, and the trigger guard is clearly defined, with gloved hands shown operating the weapon. The overall design is utilitarian, built for durability and sustained fire in urban combat scenarios. The finish is mostly matte with some metallic highlights and a few colored elements on the ammunition belt.
description: A belt-fed, matte black machine gun with a fixed stock, box magazine, and visible iron sights, designed for durability and sustained fire. Features include a robust handguard, bipod, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, bipod, and gloved hands gripping the weapon, with the barrel and iron sights aligned.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the box magazine, ammunition belt, and the full length of the fixed stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the top of the receiver, with the operator's hands visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the ejection port, charging handle, and the overall profile of the rifle.
